title: Connected Texture+
description: Do you feel frustrated by disconnected and repetitive block textures? Connected Texture+ solves this problem by delivering a seamless, immersive texture experience for all survivalists and adventurers!
body: # Connected Texture+: Enhanced Visuals for Minecraft Do you feel frustrated by disconnected and repetitive block textures? _Connected Texture+_ solves this problem by delivering a seamless, immersive texture experience for all survivalists and adventurers! *** ## ✨ Key Features * **Connected Textures for Vanilla Blocks**: Enjoy smooth, connected textures for **glass**, **sandstone**, **stones**, **bookshelves**, **wools**, and more! * **Custom Pattern Textures**: Experience unique designs for **glass panes**, **stained glass**, and **iron bars**. * **Performance-Friendly**: Optimized lightweight textures to ensure smooth and lag-free gameplay. * **Stylish and Minimalistic**: Compatible with modern or classic build styles, making it perfect for any world. *** ## 📋 Compatibility ### ⚙️ Required Mods To use _Connected Texture+_, you need at least one of the following mods installed: #### **Option 1: [Continuity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/continuity)** * If you are using Sodium, make sure to pair it with **[Indium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/indium)** for Continuity support. #### **Option 2: [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)** * The least preferred option for connected textures, but it is not recommended if you are already using Fabric. *** > **📝 Important Notes**: > > * **This pack is INCOMPATIBLE with [Fusion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fusion-connected-textures)!** *** ## 🌟 Feedback & Support Love the pack? Show your support by **[buying me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/sockdog)!** Your feedback and support motivate me to continue updating and improving _Connected Texture+_. *** ## 📞 Contact Have questions, feedback, or suggestions? Get in touch with me! * **CurseForge Comments**: Leave your feedback on this page. * **Discord**: [Connected Texture+](https://discord.gg/qbYgfwjDYC) I’m always open to ideas and improvements to make this pack even better! *** ## Available on: ![Modrinth](https://luken.cc/badges/modrinth) ![CurseForge](https://luken.cc/badges/curseforge) **Download now and start playing with seamless textures!**
